title: DeathRecord
description: Records your death locations and lets you navigate back via waypoint pins, a world-space marker, and a HUD compass.
body:
# Death Record

Never lose your items after dying again.  
**Death Record** logs every death and guides you back to the exact spot — with a world-space floating marker you can see through walls.

---

## Features

### ☠ Death Log
Press **R** (rebindable) to open the Death Log screen.  
Each entry shows the **time**, **cause of death**, **dimension**, and **coordinates**.

### 📍 Waypoint Pin
Click **Set Pin** on any entry to mark that death location.

- **World-space label** — a floating `☠ Xm / Death Log` sign appears in the world, always facing you, visible through terrain
- **Particle beacon** — a red dust ring + rising pillar + yellow flare marks the exact block
- **HUD compass** — distance, 8-direction arrow, and vertical offset (↑/↓) displayed on screen at all times while a pin is active


### 🌏 Localisation
- English (`en_us`)
- 日本語 (`ja_jp`)
